recommendations.title: The Final Cut
recommendations.overview: Set in a world with memory implants, Alan Hakman is a 'cutter'—someone with the power of final edit over people's recorded histories—but his latest assignment puts him in great danger.

recommendations.title: Barbie as the Island Princess
recommendations.overview: Young Rosella is saved by a few kind animals after a shipwreck. Now called Ro, she learns to talk to animals. One day, she saves the life of a prince and returns to civilisation to discover her past.

recommendations.title: Kaminey
recommendations.overview: Two brothers, as different as chalk and cheese, find their lives intertwined when one puts himself in danger via a `get rich quick' scheme and the other finds there is a price on his head.

recommendations.title: Hunting & Gathering
recommendations.overview: When Camille falls ill, she is forced to live with Philibert and Franck.

recommendations.title: The Suite Life Movie
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Comedy, Family, Drama, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Cody and Zack are approached to join the Gemini Project, a high-tech research center studying the dynamics between twins. Shockingly, they find themselves interconnected in a whole new way! When one twin experiences something, the other twin feels it

recommendations.title: Our Relations
recommendations.overview: Two sailors get caught in a mountain of mix-ups when they meet their long-lost twins. Laurel and Hardy play themselves and their twins.

recommendations.title: Old Joy

recommendations.title: 10.0 Earthquake
recommendations.overview: Los Angeles is about to be hit by a devastating earthquake, and time is running out to save the city from imminent danger.

recommendations.title: The Skeleton Twins
